add.fillHelp.measured: Total weight on a scale now (filament + empty spool).
add.fillHelp.remaining: Weight of filament still on the spool.
add.importNote: This filament will be added to your catalog when you add the spools.
add.typeToSearchAll: Type to search thousands of filaments
add.vendorHint.optional: Optional — leave blank for no manufacturer
buttons.notAccessTitle: You don't have permission to access
dashboard.title: Dashboard
filament.fields.name: Name
filament.fieldsHelp.multiColorDirection: Filaments can have multiple colors in two ways: either through coextrusion, like dual-color filaments with consistent multi-colors, or through longitudinal color changes, like gradient filaments that shift colors along the spool.
filament.fieldsHelp.name: Filament name, to distinguish this filament type among others from the same manufacturer. Should contain the color for example.
filament.fieldsHelp.spoolWeight: The weight of an empty spool. Used to determine measured weight of a spool.
filament.fieldsHelp.weight: The filament weight of a full spool (net weight). This should not include the weight of the spool itself, only the filament. It is what is usually written on the packaging.
filament.form.filamentUpdated: This filament has been updated by someone/something else since you opened this page. Saving will overwrite those changes!
filament.form.importExternalDescription:
Select a filament in the list to automatically populate its details in the filament creation form. This will overwrite any data you have entered in the form.

A Manufacturer object will be created automatically when you click Ok, if necessary.
help.description:
Here are some tips to get you started.

Spoolman holds 3 different types of data:

To add a new spool to the database, start by creating a Filament object. Once that's done, proceed to create a Spool object for that specific spool. If you acquire additional spools of the same filament later on, simply generate additional Spool objects and reuse the same Filament object.

Optionally, you can also generate a Manufacturer object for the company manufacturing the filament if you wish to track that information.

You have the option to link other 3D printer services to Spoolman, like Moonraker, which can automatically monitor filament usage and update the Spool objects for you. Refer to the Spoolman README for guidance on how to set that up.
help.resources.filament: Brands of filament. They have properties such as name, material, color, diameter, and more.
help.resources.spool: Individual physical spools of a specific filament.
help.resources.vendor: The companies that make the filament.
home.description: It looks like you haven't added any spools yet. See the <helpPageLink>Help page</helpPageLink> for help getting started.
inspector.adjustHelp: Positive consumes filament, negative adds it back.
inspector.empty: Select a spool, filament or manufacturer from the list to see its details here.
inspector.notFound: This item could not be found. It may have been deleted.
inspector.measuredHelp: Total weight of the spool + remaining filament, as read from a scale.
labels.blank: You don't have any label designs yet.
labels.canvasHint: Drag to move · click to select · handles to resize.
labels.designerDesc: Design QR-code labels with any spool, filament, or vendor field, then print them on sheets or a label printer. Designs are saved on the server.
labels.dpiHint: Match your printer to keep small labels sharp: 203 dpi for most thermal label printers, 300 or more for laser and inkjet.
labels.fitWidthHint: Set the label width so the chosen number of columns fills the page.
labels.hintNowrap: Text stays on one line; anything past the width is clipped.
labels.hintSwatch: Filled with the spool's filament color(s) at print time.
labels.hintWrap: Wrap a field to hide it when empty:
labels.imageDesc: Saves one PNG per selected spool instead of printing, each {{w}}×{{h}} mm.
labels.imageZipNote: More than {{threshold}} labels are delivered as a single zip file.
labels.selectElement: Select an element to edit it, or add one from the palette.
labels.selectRecentHint: Select spools added in the last 24 hours
labels.showingTags: Fields show as tags until you pick a spool above.
labels.typeHint: Filament labels leave out spool-only fields, and their QR code links to the filament instead of a spool.
library.apiError: Couldn't reach the Spoolman API. Is the backend running?
library.emptyBody: Add your first spool to start tracking your filament.
locations.dragHint: Drag spools between locations to reassign them, or within a location to reorder them
locations.errorExists: A location with that name already exists
locations.noLocationsHelp: This page lets you organize your spools in locations, add some spools to get started!
notifications.createError: There was an error creating {{resource}} (status code: {{statusCode}})
printing.generic.deleteSettingsConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this preset?
printing.generic.description: Tune in the settings below to get the desired print layout. Keep in mind that printers and your OS may apply it's own margins and scaling, so you may need to perform some trial-and-error before it's all correct. Test it on a piece of regular paper before printing on the actual labels.
printing.generic.gridTooWide: The labels are wider than the page. Reduce the number of columns, the spacing, or the margins.
printing.generic.helpMargin: Margins should be configured to match your label paper and printer, changing these will affect the size of the entire grid.
printing.generic.helpPrinterMargin: Safe-Zone should be set to how close to the paper edge your printer can print, changing these will not affect the entire grid.
printing.generic.title: Printing
printing.qrcode.templateHelp: Use '{{''}}' to insert values of the spool object as text. For example, '{{'id'}}' will be replaced with the spool id, or '{{'filament.material'}}' will be replaced with the material of the spool. if a value is missing it will be replaced with "?". A second set of '{{''}}' can be used to remove this. In addition, any text between the sets of '{{''}}' will be removed if the value is missing. For example, '{{'Lot Nr: '{{'lot_nr'}}''}}' will only show the label if the spool has a lot number. Enclose text with double asterix ** to make it bold. Click the button to view a list of all available tags.
printing.qrcode.title: Label Printing
printing.qrcode.customUrl.caveat: A custom URL won't scan back into Spoolman — use it to point a printed QR at an external app or a different host.
printing.qrcode.customUrl.hint: Insert the spool id anywhere with the placeholder
printing.qrcode.customUrl.label: Custom URL template
printing.qrcode.useHTTPUrl.label: QR code link
printing.qrcode.useHTTPUrl.tooltip: Default encodes a Spoolman-only code that only Spoolman's own scanner can read. URL encodes a normal web link that any scanner can open, built from the base URL in settings — or this site's address if that's unset.

printing.spoolSelect.noSpoolsSelected: You have not selected any spools.
printing.spoolSelect.title: Select Spools

scanner.error.notAllowed: You have not allowed access to the camera.
scanner.error.streamApiNotSupported: The browser does not support the MediaStream API.

settings.appearance.theme.label: Theme
settings.extraFields.choicesMissingError: You cannot remove choices. The following choices are missing: {{choices}}
settings.extraFields.deleteConfirmDescri: This will delete the field and all associated data for all entities.
settings.extraFields.description.constra: Once a field is added, you can not change its key or type, and for choice type fields you can not remove choices or change the multi choice state. If you remove a field, the associated data for all entities will be deleted.
settings.extraFields.description.intro: Here you can add extra custom fields to your entities.
settings.extraFields.description.keyUsag: The key is what other programs read/write the data as, so if your custom field is supposed to integrate with a third-party program, make sure to set it correctly. Default value is only applied to new items.
settings.extraFields.description.tableVi: Extra fields can be shown and sorted in the table views. Choice and boolean fields expose filter options there as well, and all extra field types support filtering for empty values.
settings.extraFields.errors.choiceNeeded: Choice fields need at least one choice.
settings.extraFields.errors.keyExists: A field with this key already exists.
settings.extraFields.errors.keyFormat: Key must contain only lowercase letters, numbers and underscores.
settings.extraFields.keyNotChanged: Please change the key to something else.
settings.extraFields.params.name: Name
settings.extraFields.shortDesc: Define custom fields for spools, filaments and manufacturers. Field type and key can't change once created; choices can only be added.
settings.general.baseUrl.label: Base URL
settings.general.baseUrl.tooltip: The base URL to use when generating features such as QR codes.
settings.general.currency.desc: Three-letter ISO code (e.g. EUR, USD) used for prices
settings.general.currency.label: Currency
settings.general.externalUrl.desc: Base URL used in QR codes and links to this instance
settings.general.externalUrl.label: External URL
settings.general.roundPrices.label: Round prices
settings.general.roundPrices.tooltip: Round prices to the nearest whole number.
settings.language.label: Language
settings.library.lowThreshold.desc: Spools at or below this weight are flagged red (this browser only)
settings.library.lowThreshold.label: Low-stock threshold
spool.fieldsHelp.externalFilament: You have selected a filament from the external database. A filament object (and possibly a manufacturer object) will be created automatically when you create this spool. This can create duplicate filament objects if you have already created a filament object for this filament.
spool.fieldsHelp.initialWeight: The initial weight of filament on the spool (net weight). Will use the weight from the filament object if not set.
spool.fieldsHelp.location: Where the spool is located if you have multiple locations where you store your spools.
spool.fieldsHelp.lotNr: Manufacturer's lot number. Can be used to ensure a print has consistent color if multiple spools are used.
spool.fieldsHelp.measuredWeight: How much the filament and spool weigh.
spool.fieldsHelp.price: Price of a full spool. If not set, the price of the filament will be assumed instead.
spool.fieldsHelp.remainingWeight: How much filament is left on the spool. For a new spool this should match the spool weight.
spool.fieldsHelp.spoolWeight: The weight of the spool when it is empty. Leave empty to use the value from the filament or the manufacturer.
spool.fieldsHelp.usedWeight: How much filament has been used from the spool. A new spool should have 0g used.
spool.fieldsHelp.weightToUse: Select what weight value to enter. Measured weight is only available if the spool weight is set for the selected filament.
spool.form.adjustFilamentHelp: Here you can directly add or subtract filament from the spool. A positive value will consume filament, a negative value will add it.
